title: The Reincarnation of the Strongest Exorcist In Another World
titleRomaji: Saikyou Onmyouji no Isekai Tenseiki: Geboku no Youkaidomo ni Kurabete Monster ga Yowai Sugirundaga @comic
titleEnglish: The Reincarnation of the Strongest Exorcist In Another World
titleNative: 最強陰陽師の異世界転生記 ～下僕の妖怪どもに比べてモンスターが弱すぎるんだが～
synonyms: The Reincarnation of the Strongest Onmyoji: These Monsters Are Too Weak Compared to My Youkai
The Reincarnation of the Strongest Onmyoji ~ These Monsters Are Too Weak Compared to My Youkai~
synopsis: Haruyoshi Kuga's power as the strongest exorcist is all for naught when he is betrayed by his closest ally. With his dying breath, he casts the secret Spell of Reincarnation—when he next opens his eyes, he finds himself in a different world altogether, reincarnated as Seika Lamprogue, the son of a family of magic scholars! He quickly learns that the magic in this new world is quite unlike the sorcery he learned in his past life and that he can't use it. Fortunately for him, with his mastery of curses and the hordes of youkai at his disposal, he doesn't need to. Haruyoshi (now Seika) is determined not to repeat his past mistakes in his second life by smartly laying low and avoiding flaunting his power. Yet accomplishing his goals and without drawing attention to himself proves to be easier said than done—will his powers be enough to live a happy life?! (Source: J-Novel Club)

title: Farming Life in Another World
synopsis: After Hiraku dies of a serious illness, God brings him back to life, gives his health and youth back, and sends him to a fantasy world of his choice. In order to enjoy his second shot, God bestows upon him the almighty farming tool! Watch as Hiraku digs, chops
latestChapterTitle: The Village Chief and the Camping Wagon (2)

title: Henkyougurashi no Maou, Tensei shite Saikyou no Majutsushi ni Naru
titleRomaji: Henkyougurashi no Maou, Tensei shite Saikyou no Majutsushi ni Naru
titleNative: 辺境ぐらしの魔王、転生して最強の魔術師になる
synonyms: The Demon King of the Frontier Life, Reincarnated To Become the Strongest Mage ~The Former Demon King Who Grows up While Being Loved, Wants To Know Humans~
synopsis: There was a mage called "The Lone Demon King" at the frontier. He was just a creature that never grew old, but he was loved by the villagers as something of a guardian deity. However, he was destroyed by a magic organization that sees his existence as dangerous. 200 years later, he is reincarnated as the second son of an aristocrat and obtains the strongest magic power. "Let's pretend to be a human this time..." However, being a human lover, he didn't particularly think of revenge and has decided to pretend to be human in this life. In his past life, he was the guardian deity of a region, and in this life, he's a local aristocrat, but he does not know common sense. He doesn't know how to take it easy. As the second son of an aristocrat, he is loved by his family and friends, and while he is regarded as a master of magic in the magic guild, he becomes an "Immortal Mage" behind the scenes. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Shishosei
synopsis: Concurrent with the sudden and mysterious death of the youth who was to be selected as the next king, the "Library Tower," which housed all the books of the country, was sealed off. However, deep in the recesses of the tower, where no one should have been able to enter, sat the one who was known as the "Shisosei." In the palace where rumors flutter about, conspiracies begin to swirl. What is the astonishing reality behind the connection of the youth's death, the Library Tower, and the country's secret tool, the Shisosei?

title: Futari Machiaruki
synopsis: Hina has just moved into her own place to start university, in a town that's livable but rather dull and boring. She figured, “Well, it's just for four years of college, so I'll just put up with it...” until one day when she meets Kage, a young man taking photos of seemingly ordinary spots around town. Intrigued by Kage's photos, Hina decides to join him on a stroll through the city! Suddenly, her impression of this boring town begins to shift...!? (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

titleEnglish: Touge Oni: Primal Gods in Ancient Times

(Source: Yen Press)

title: My BFF is a Tyrant in Training
titleEnglish: My BFF is a Tyrant in Training
synonyms: I Raised My Childhood Friend as a Tyrant
ฉันเลี้ยงเพื่อนสมัยเด็กให้กลายเป็นทรราช
J’ai élevé mon ami d’enfance comme un tyran
synopsis: A young Korean woman is reincarnated inside a novel as Viche Amelian, who according to the story, is to be executed in place of the young prince Jade for assassinating the emperor. After facing her death, she expects to get her old life back, but instead wakes up as a 10-year-old Viche! Could it be that her death failed to turn Jade into a tyrant, as the story foretold? Viche must now figure out where she went wrong, and make sure that this time, Jade becomes the world’s most wicked tyrant! (Source: Tapas) Note: Includes four extra chapters.

One day Kanae decides to buy plenty of lottery tickets, and they hit the first prize! Which means they won 700 millions yens ?! Such a sudden pressure makes Chie unable to concentrate on her exams... Now she's desperate !! With all that money in her pocket she's going to enjoy her life at the fullest ! A money and girls comedy that begins by hitting the jackpot at the lottery !! (Source: Magazine Pocket, translated)

synopsis: Clouds blacken the sky and sheets of rain turn the mountain forest into a treacherous maze... A landslide crushes a razor wire fence, and buries a "NO TRESPASSING" sign... title: Over Rev!
synonyms: A Legend of Ultimate Hot Rodder
synopsis: Ryoko's life used to revolve around track but due to an injury she can no longer follow the path she hoped to. One day while out with her friends, she witnesses two cars racing and gets caught up in the excitement, especially after realizing the one driver is a young woman like herself! When a chance arrives for her to try drifting, she dives right in, even though she's never driven a car before. Suddenly, she has a new passion... and a lot to learn. (Source: Shogakukan, translated)

title: How to Love a Loser
synopsis: Shinba has no talent, no job, no money...he's a complete loser. However, he has a girlfriend, Hizumi who is beautiful, smart, good at her work. He has no idea why she says she likes him. He's almost scared, but loves Hizumi so much...he asks Hizumi, "Why do you want to date with someone like me?" She answers..."You always oversleep, talk about some video games I don't even know about, sing lame songs no one knows at karaoke, gave me a toy ring as a gift. Your face is always gloomy as hell. But...looking at such face makes me happy, Shinba. I love you, ha ha." Is she telling the truth? Hizumi must have some kind of a secret, Shinba thinks. He wants to find out...but maybe he shouldn't. (Source: BookWalker)

title: Yuusha no Ore-sama ga Madoushi Nanka ni!
titleRomaji: Yuusha no Ore-sama ga Madoushi Nanka ni!
titleNative: 勇者の俺様が魔導士なんかに！
synopsis: Leo, a mage, is expelled from the heroic party by Kane, the brave, because he just can't get on with. However, after Leo leaves, the party continues to lose. Kane asks Leo to return to the party, but Leo fed up with Kane's unmannerly attitude, asks Kane to get down on his knees... Kane's pride is shattered, and when Kane shows tears for the first time, Leo feels a certain excitement...? (Source: Libre, translated) Notes: - Chapter 13 was split into two parts in the original serialization and later combined in the volume release. “Stretch (ストレッチ)” published in Pixiv Comic was not included in any of the volumes. - Includes six extra chapters.

title: Kono Sekai de Ore dake ga (Level Up) wo Shitteiru
titleRomaji: Kono Sekai de Ore dake ga (Level Up) wo Shitteiru
titleNative: この世界で俺だけが【レベルアップ】を知っている
synonyms: Only I Know About "Leveling Up" in This World
Thế Giới Chỉ Mình Tôi Level Up
synopsis: A world where the worth of one's life is decided by one's Level. Theo, an S-Rank adventurer, had reincarnated thousand years later in a future where the people had forgotten about the power called "Level Up." In this world where a person would be Level 1 at birth, humanity is persecuted as the weakest race and the people lived everyday while fearing the danger of monsters. However, in their midst only Theo, who was chosen to be a sacrifice for the monsters, knew that humans can become the strongest because only they have the ability to Level Up.
chapterSourceTitle: Kono Sekai de Ore dake ga "Level Up" wo Shitteiru
